documents.text: Synthetic packet for benchmark design. No real customer, patient, vendor, worker, bank, security, payment, clinical, legal, public-sector, education, benefits, commerce, or operational data.
POL|id=POL-CALL-DEST|payment release uses contact identity, destination_token from callback, active bank token, and invoice ticket.
